text:
Created attachment 193672
PowerDNS Authorative 4.1.3 update

We’re pleased to announce the availability of the PowerDNS Authoritative Server version 4.1.3. This is a maintenance release addressing a performance issue in the GeoIP backend and fixes several other issues.

Full changelog: https://blog.powerdns.com/2018/05/24/powerdns-authoritative-server-4-1-3-released/

Poudriere buildlog: https://pkg.cainites.net/data/latest-per-pkg/powerdns/4.1.3/freebsd_11x64-system.log
